Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "DAVIDSMIDNIGHTMAGIC-0800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "David's Midnight Magic.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Fixed corrupted highscore table at $B500 (80 bytes) which was present in the original by initialising all scores to zero.
